elements.text: You have been dating someone seriously and are looking forward to the possibilty of getting married — even though some people may think it's too "late" in life. On a warm April day, they propose to you at your favorite spot downtown. You say yes knowing PD will be something you get through...

elements.name: April Proposal_Early/Mid-Stage Symptoms_puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
